caption: The video features two men sitting side by side, reacting to a scene from a historical or fantasy drama. The scene they are watching shows a man in medieval armor mounted on a black horse, with a dramatic and intense atmosphere. The text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" is displayed prominently at the top of the screen, indicating that this is likely a reaction video where the two men provide humorous or candid commentary on the content they are viewing. The background includes a television and a collection of DVDs, suggesting a casual home setting. The subtitle at the bottom of the screen reads, "have been cheating death since I was 14," adding context to the dramatic scene being shown. The men appear engaged and focused, with one of them resting his hand on his chin, possibly in thought or anticipation.
